REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVERO MENDOZA, ROXANA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,410.67 FILED BY RIVERO MENDOZA, ROXANA AS TO DEFENDANT KWAN, NICHOLAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-13-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT KWAN, NICHOLAS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG. PLAINTIFF ROXANA RIVERO MENDOZA IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS KWAN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG;; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY RIVERO MENDOZA, ROXANA KWAN, NICHOLAS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVERO MENDOZA, ROXANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KWAN, NICHOLAS SECURITY DEPOSIT WAS PROPERLY ACCOUNTED FOR. PLAINTIFF REMAINED IN POSSESSION OF PREMISES UNTIL NO EARLIER THAN JAN-20-2026. DEFENDANT WAS PERMITTED TO COLLECT RENT BOARD FEE PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO ADMINISTRATIVE CODE SECTION 37A.6. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
